title: Nether Skeletons
description: Gives Skeletons in Nether biomes a unique fiery look.
body:
![Soul Fire covered Skeletons in a Soul Sand Valley biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c43ad618f166c933cab00f09ea779ea493b8a6db.png)
## **Gives Skeletons in Nether biomes a unique fiery look.**

**_Requires_ Optifine, EMF+ETF, or other custom entity model Minecraft mods to work.**

Made By Gooppixel
